mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, introduction, price, quantity, image, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{introduction}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{image}, #{createTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), introduction = VALUES(introduction), price = VALUES(price), quantity = VALUES(quantity), image = VALUES(image), createtime = VALUES(createtime)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, introduction, price, quantity, image, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{introduction}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{image}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, introduction = #{introduction}, price = #{price}, quantity = #{quantity}, image = #{image}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET quantity = quantity - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND quantity >= #{quantity}
